ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "course_category" TEXT /* Category of the course (e.g., Science, Arts) */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student was enrolled in the university */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic adviser */,
  "academic_standing" TEXT /* Academic standing of the student (e.g., good, probation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "grade" REAL /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the student completed the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each discussion forum */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the discussion forum */,
  "position" REAL /* Position of the discussion in the course (if applicable) */,
  "podcast_has_student_posts" INTEGER /* Indicates if the discussion has student posts */,
  "discussion_type" TEXT /* Type of discussion (e.g., threaded, single-threaded) */,
  "lock_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the discussion is locked */,
  "allow_rating" INTEGER /* Indicates if ratings are allowed in the discussion */,
  "discussion_subentry_count" INTEGER /* Count of sub-entries in the discussion */,
  "podcast_url" TEXT /* URL of the podcast associated with the discussion (if applicable) */,
  "read_state" TEXT /* Read state of the discussion (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Indicates if the discussion is published */,
  "pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the discussion is pinned */,
  "todo_date" TEXT /* Date and time for the todo item associated with the discussion */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the discussion */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the discussion belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the discussion */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the discussion (e.g., for categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "discussion_id" TEXT /* ID of the discussion the post belongs to */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was made */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the post */,
  "parent_post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent post (if applicable) */,
  "read_state" TEXT /* Read state of the post (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the post (if applicable) */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last edited */,
  "edit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been edited */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_posts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_posts_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being rated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who rated the post */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment along with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_ratings_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES discussion_posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_ratings_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the assignment */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assignment is published */,
  "todo_date" TEXT /* Date and time for the todo item associated with the assignment */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the assignment */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points possible for the assignment */,
  "late_policy" TEXT /* Late submission policy for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" TEXT /* ID of the assignment the submission belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was submitted */,
  "submission_file" TEXT /* File path to the submitted assignment */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade given to the submission */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "late_submission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the submission was late */,
  "late_penalty" REAL /* Penalty applied for late submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., instructor, student, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., create_discussion, submit_assignment) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the resource belongs to */,
  "discussion_id" TEXT /* ID of the discussion being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, submit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who accessed the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_read_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each read log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who read the discussion */,
  "discussion_id" TEXT /* ID of the discussion being read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the discussion was read */,
  "read_state" TEXT /* Read state of the discussion (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who read the discussion */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who read the discussion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_read_logs_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_read_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_read_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each read log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who read the assignment */,
  "assignment_id" TEXT /* ID of the assignment being read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was read */,
  "read_state" TEXT /* Read state of the assignment (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who read the assignment */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who read the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_read_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_read_logs_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_read_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each read log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who read the course material */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course material being read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the course material was read */,
  "read_state" TEXT /* Read state of the course material (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who read the course material */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who read the course material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_read_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, post, submit) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who performed the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each final grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the final grade belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the final grade */,
  "final_grade" REAL /* Final grade for the course */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date and time the final grade was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
